title: quercus fabrei
intro: Quercus fabrei, also known as the Chinese or Manchurian oak, is a deciduous tree species native to China and parts of Russia. The bark and leaves of the Quercus fabrei plant are used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, with its medicinal properties attributed to its high tannin content. The health benefits of Quercus fabrei include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. Quercus fabrei is commonly prepared as an herbal tea, decoction, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
